LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT'S MOTION TO ENFORCE JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE PARTIES FAILED TO JOINTLY EXECUTE CONTRACT DOCUMENTS CONFORMING TO THE AWARD AS PROVIDED IN PARAGRAPH 2(B) OF THE JANUARY 2005 AWARD. AS A CONSEQUENCE; EACH PARTY MUST ACCEPT THE OBLIGATIONS OF THE PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT OR FORFEIT HIS RIGHT TO THE SALE OF THE VALLEJO PRACTICE. ANY SALE OF THE VALLEJO PRACTICE MUST BE DONE IN ACCORDANCE WITH PARAGRAPH SEVENTEEN OF THE DENTAL PRACTICE PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT FOR VALLEJO DENTAL OFFICE, EXECUTED ON MARCH 10, 1986. PARAGRAPHS TWO AND THREE OF THE JUDGMENT OF AUGUST 9, 2007 ARE NO LONGER APPLICABLE. IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS, THE JUDGMENT REMAINS IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
